build.buildCommand: if [ -f prisma/schema.prisma ]; then echo "Already in service directory: $PWD"; elif [ -d apps/coinet-platform ]; then echo "Changing to apps/coinet-platform..."; cd apps/coinet-platform && pwd; else echo "ERROR: Cannot find apps/coinet-platform directory"; ls -la; exit 1; fi && if [ ! -f package.json ]; then echo "ERROR: package.json not found in $PWD"; ls -la; exit 1; fi && if [ ! -f prisma/schema.prisma ]; then echo "ERROR: prisma/schema.prisma not found in $PWD"; ls -la prisma/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'prisma directory missing'; exit 1; fi && echo "Building from: $PWD" && npm install && (DATABASE_URL="postgresql://dummy:dummy@localhost:5432/dummy" npx prisma generate || echo 'Prisma generate skipped') && npm run build
